name: All-in-One-Pan Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Milk; heated to almost boiling
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sift flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt into a 9x13-inch baking pan.
3. Add water, oil, vinegar, and vanilla extract. Mix with a large rubber spatula until smooth, taking care to mix ingredients along the edges.
4. Bake until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 40 minutes. Cool completely on a wire rack.
5. For the frosting: Combine butter and shortening in a food processor or mixing bowl. Add sugar and vanilla extract. Mix until smooth, about 2 minutes.
6. Slowly drizzle in milk. Beat for 2 minutes in a food processor or mix for 7-10 minutes with a mixer until smooth, satiny, and fluffy. Chill for 20 minutes before frosting.
